canonical_answer: At 0s, a person wearing jumping stilts moves across a paved area; at 2s, the person begins bouncing on the stilts along a path; at 4s, the person is seen riding a bicycle on the walkways; at 18s, the person jumps mid-air on a pogo stick near pine trees.

question: Describe the activities and immediate surroundings of the person in red as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the person uses stilts near curved steps and trees; at 2s, they bounce on paths near white apartment buildings; at 8s, they walk past parked vehicles and balconies; at 18s, they jump on a pogo stick with pine trees behind them.
